versatile.example: She is a versatile player who can play any position.
versatile.example_zh: 她是個能勝任任何位置的全能球員。

veterinarian-vet.example: We took our dog to the vet.

veto.example: The president used his veto on the bill.
veto.example_zh: 總統對這項法案行使了否決權。
委員會否決了這個計畫。

vibrate.example: The phone began to vibrate on the table.
vibrate.example_zh: 手機在桌上震動了起來。

vibration.example: You can feel the vibration of the engine.
vibration.example_zh: 你能感覺到引擎的震動。

vice.example_zh: 懶惰是他唯一的壞毛病。

victor.example: The victor raised the trophy high.

vigor.example: She tackled the task with vigor.
vigor.example_zh: 她充滿幹勁地處理這項任務。

vigorous.zh: 精力充沛的、強而有力的
vigorous.example: He took a vigorous morning walk.
vigorous.example_zh: 他早上精神奕奕地散了步。

villa.example: They rented a villa by the sea.
villa.example_zh: 他們在海邊租了一棟別墅。

villain.example: The villain in the story was defeated.
villain.example_zh: 故事裡的反派被打敗了。

vineyard.example: They make wine from this vineyard.
vineyard.example_zh: 他們用這座葡萄園的葡萄釀酒。

violinist.example_zh: 小提琴家演奏得很優美。

virgin.example: The painting shows the Virgin Mary.
virgin.example_zh: 這幅畫描繪了聖母瑪利亞。

vitality.example: The children are full of vitality.

wag.example: The happy dog wagged its tail.
wag.example_zh: 那隻開心的狗搖著尾巴。

walnut.example: She added walnuts to the cake.

ward.example: The nurse works in the children's ward.
ward.example_zh: 這位護理師在兒童病房工作。

ward.example: She wore a hat to ward off the sun.

wardrobe.example: Her clothes hang in the wardrobe.

warrant.example: His behavior does not warrant such anger.
warrant.example_zh: 他的行為不值得這麼生氣。

warrant.example: The police had a warrant to search the house.
warrant.example_zh: 警方持有搜索這間房子的令狀。

warranty.example: The phone comes with a one-year warranty.
warranty.example_zh: 這支手機附帶一年保固。

waterproof.example: She wore a waterproof jacket in the rain.
waterproof.example_zh: 她在雨中穿著防水外套。

weary.example: The travelers were weary after the long trip.
weary.example_zh: 長途旅行後旅人們都很疲憊。

wharf.example: The boat was tied to the wharf.

whiskey-whisky.example: The bar sells whiskey to adults only.
whiskey-whisky.example_zh: 這家酒吧只賣威士忌給成年人。

wholesale.example: They buy goods at wholesale prices.
wholesale.example_zh: 他們以批發價購買貨物。

wholesome.zh: 有益健康的、有益身心的
wholesome.example: The meal was simple but wholesome.
wholesome.example_zh: 這頓飯雖簡單卻很營養健康。

widow-widower.example: The kind widow lived next door.
widow-widower.example_zh: 那位善良的寡婦住在隔壁。

withhold.example: She decided to withhold the bad news.
withhold.example_zh: 她決定暫時不透露這個壞消息。

woe.example: He told us all his woes.
woe.example_zh: 他向我們訴說了他所有的煩惱。

woodpecker.example: A woodpecker tapped on the tree.
woodpecker.example_zh: 一隻啄木鳥在樹上啄著。

workforce.example: The factory has a large workforce.
workforce.example_zh: 這間工廠擁有龐大的勞動力。

wrestle.example: The two boys wrestled on the grass.
wrestle.example_zh: 兩個男孩在草地上扭打。

wrinkle.example: She ironed the wrinkles out of the shirt.
wrinkle.example_zh: 她把襯衫上的皺褶燙平。

wrinkle.example: He wrinkled his nose at the smell.
wrinkle.example_zh: 聞到那味道他皺起了鼻子。

yearn.example: She yearned to see her family again.

yoga.example: She does yoga to stay calm and flexible.
yoga.example_zh: 她做瑜伽來保持平靜與柔軟。

yogurt.example: He eats yogurt with fruit for breakfast.

zoom.example: The camera can zoom in on distant objects.
zoom.example_zh: 這台相機能拉近放大遠處的物體。

zoom.example: Cars zoomed past on the highway.
zoom.example_zh: 汽車在高速公路上飛馳而過。
